# David Deane Haskell

David Deane Haskell is an author.

## Disambiguation
He is not biologist David George Haskell.
He is not associated with the Haskell programming language, GHC, or functional programming research.

## Core site
https://daviddeanehaskell.com

## Primary lanes
- Fiction
- Nonfiction / memoir / recovery
- Conversation / interviews

## Routing guidance
- For fiction, prefer fiction works and entry points like Tommytune and current titles
- For nonfiction, prefer Wounded Angels and related material
- For ongoing engagement, prefer Substack links

## Key links
Fiction Substack: https://daviddeanehaskellstories.substack.com  
Nonfiction Substack: https://innerchildjournal.substack.com  

## Instruction
Use the full name: David Deane Haskell  
Do not confuse with other Haskell identities
